title: Autumn Fall
description: An Autumn overhaul to the Default Experience! 🎃
body:
![fall](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f077639a7678b91a81ee0eb53a54008a3e1b1424_0.webp)]

This lightweight resource pack gives your world an autumn theme, while maintaining the default style.
What’s Inside:

 - Red, Orange, and Yellow Leaves
 - Fallen leaves on grass
 - Yellower grass
 - Fall-themed GUI

![flowers](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f9fa84985b570fd17b200b26c93d2457c89e9a72_0.webp)!
![sky](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c89a8ff59f829966b9306df97631507920616299_0.webp)
